name: Hall with threadbare Carpeting on the floor
description: I'm in a Hall with threadbare Carpeting on the floor
hints: A hallway hub with threadbare carpeting. Four directions lead to important rooms.
LOOK WEST reveals Bio Gem. WEST to office with Bio Gem and natter egg. NORTH to Madame Web. EAST to Hydroman.
N→room 37 (Madame Web), S→room 2 (Tony's office), E→room 38 (Hydroman + aquarium), W→room 36 (Bio Gem + egg). LOOK WEST, AT GEM, AT BIO are special actions.
notes: Central hall hub. N→37 (Madame Web), S→2 (Tony's office), E→38 (Hydroman), W→36 (Bio Gem). LOOK WEST reveals gem. AT GEM/AT BIO can retrieve items from hallway.
